name: codex-next
description: Auto-recover Codex turns interrupted by 429, 503, and usage-limit errors.

interface.shortDescription: Retry interrupted Codex turns and inspect local recovery analytics.
interface.longDescription: Codex Next adds a Node-based Stop hook that retries 429, 503, and usage-limit interruptions with per-class and global caps, while recording local SQLite analytics for an optional localhost viewer.
defaultPrompt: Retry a Codex 503 stop with limits.
